description:
The `featured` boolean was added to the cryptid schema last session but the studio at appalachian-cryptid.sanity.studio hasn't been redeployed. Until it is, editors can't tick the checkbox in the CMS.

Steps:
1. cd sanity/appalachian-cryptid
2. npm run deploy
3. Open the studio, tick "Featured on Homepage" on a cryptid, publish
4. Confirm the homepage 'Featured Case File' slot updates after the revalidation webhook fires
title: Deploy Sanity studio so 'Featured on Homepage' checkbox is editable
